caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is centered against a solid black background, speaking and gesturing with her hands. She wears a light green, embroidered tunic with a dark necklace. In the initial sequence, she holds her hands up, gesturing with her fingers spread as she speaks. As the scene progresses, she maintains this active hand movement while her facial expression remains focused. A small, circular logo featuring the word "NPTEL" appears in the bottom left and center areas of the frames. Throughout the clip, the camera remains in a static medium shot, capturing her from the waist up. The only changes are her subtle shifts in head position, her mouth moving in speech, and the fluid motion of her hands as she emphasizes her points.
